authority: The engine and executable guards determine admission. V37 is a named forward-forcing constitution over the admitted complete V36 grammar; no target comparison determines runtime selection.

composition.candidate_grammar: All sixteen V36 directional full-chain candidates remain present.
composition.generator_partition: The active chain is exhausted by complete groups of binary plus colour counts; the two closed protein modes must carry the unordered shares {binary*groups, colour*groups}.
composition.mode_assignment: none: the relation does not identify alpha or beta with either generator
composition.runtime_uniqueness: Exactly one complete V36 candidate must satisfy the unordered census or execution halts.

required_derivation_guards.assembled_form_minimality: Generated assembly enumeration proves neither bare generator reaches the partition span; multiplication is genuinely required for each registered share.
required_derivation_guards.dependency_trace_to_the_One_or_an_engine: The terminal One, binary count, colour count, two closed protein modes and complete sixteen-candidate grammar are inherited through the V2, V34, V35 and V36 engine closures.
required_derivation_guards.engine_halt_on_violation: Ernos and Python guards halt on indivisible active length, generator exhaustion failure, form non-uniqueness, candidate-count drift, zero/multiple qualifying paths, source drift, import drift or seal drift.
required_derivation_guards.generated_complete_candidate_space: The census is evaluated over every one of the sixteen V36 candidates; it does not create or omit a path.
required_derivation_guards.measured_provenance_excluded_from_deriva: Selector input is exactly run_id and sequence. Coordinates and structural comparison remain inaccessible until the V37 seal is verified.
required_derivation_guards.named_shape_uniqueness: Among one-operation +,-,*,/ forms, unordered b+c uniquely gives the partition span and unit multiplication uniquely gives each share.
required_derivation_guards.purpose_matched_real_execution: Required before promotion and recorded separately by the sealed ubiquitin L76 cumulative development benchmark.
